title: Biographical Writing
description: Writing another person's life: voice, scope, primary sources, ethical limits.
summary_pt_br: Biografia: escopo, fontes primárias, preservar voz, limites éticos (privado vs público).

scenes.subtitle_en: Writing another person's life: voice, scope, primary sources, ethical limits.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Biografia: escopo, fontes primárias, preservar voz, limites éticos (privado vs público).

scenes.text_en: Writing another person's life: voice, scope, primary sources, ethical limits. Focus: biographical writing. Scope is the first decision — which years will you cover?
scenes.text_pt: Biografia: escopo, fontes primárias, preservar voz, limites éticos (privado vs público). Foco: biographical writing. Escopo é a primeira decisão — quais anos?

scenes.title: Biographical Writing
scenes.body_en: Bio craft: decide SCOPE (life, decade, moment). Use PRIMARY sources when possible. Preserve the subject's VOICE. Handle ethical limits (private vs public) explicitly.
scenes.body_pt: Biografia: escopo, fontes primárias, preservar voz, limites éticos (privado vs público).

examples.en: Scope is the first decision — which years will you cover?
examples.pt: Escopo é a primeira decisão — quais anos?

examples.en: Primary sources beat secondary accounts every time.
examples.pt: Fontes primárias ganham das secundárias sempre.

examples.en: Ethical lines separate private from public life.
examples.pt: Limites éticos separam vida privada e pública.

exercise.question: Complete: "Scope is the first ___ — which years will you cover?"
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Scope is the first decision — which years will you cover?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Escopo é a primeira decisão — quais anos?

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Primary sources beat secondary accounts every time.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Primary sources beat secondary accounts every time."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Fontes primárias ganham das secundárias sempre.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Biographical Writing — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre biographical writing. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lúcia, what's your first decision when writing a life?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Scope — which years do we cover?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you preserve the subject's voice?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Ethical limit in your current biography?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Mental health struggles she never publicized.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you decide what to include?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Consent of family, respect for dignity.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Biography is the slowest form of love.

scenes.title: The biographer's library
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four craft decisions. Use at least three biographical terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In her crowded home library, Dona Lúcia spread three boxes of letters across the table and prepared to spend the decade with them.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Scope is the first decision — I am writing the decade between her arrival in Brazil and her first novel.

paragraphs.speaker: Assistant
paragraphs.en: You insist on primary sources — her letters, her diaries, her own handwriting — whenever they exist.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Preserving her voice means reading four thousand pages of her writing until my sentences catch her rhythm.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Ethical lines matter — her mental health struggles were never public, so I consulted her family before including them.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Biography, Lúcia often said, is the slowest form of love — ten years of listening to someone who cannot answer back.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Biographical Writing". Writing another person's life: voice, scope, primary sources, ethical limits. Scope is the first decision — which years will you cover? Primary sources beat secondary accounts every time. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Biographical Writing". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
